name: GoSearch
description: Federated AI enterprise search across all SaaS apps with low TCO and no indexing infrastructure.

seo.title: GoSearch — Search / Recommendations API
seo.meta_description: GoSearch: Federated AI enterprise search across all SaaS apps with low TCO and no indexing infrastructure.

when_to_use: Unified enterprise search across 100+ SaaS apps
Low-TCO knowledge search without indexing infrastructure
AI-powered answer retrieval from internal SaaS content
Employee productivity tool replacing multiple search tabs
Federated search for knowledge management in SMB

pros: Federated model avoids indexing cost and data duplication
Lower TCO pitch versus indexing-heavy enterprise search
AI chat layer unifies results across SaaS tools
Faster deployment than traditional enterprise search
cons: Less established than Glean or Dashworks
Federation tradeoffs: latency and weaker global ranking
Limited public case studies at large scale
review.verdict: Promising federated enterprise search if TCO is the main constraint; evaluate against more mature Glean and Dashworks.
review.best_for: Mid-market teams wanting federated enterprise search without Glean-level budgets.
review.not_for: Large enterprises needing proven scale and deep ranking control.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
